news.t: This defensive, stock-based ETF is beating the market this year

holdings.infoBox: POWA is an equity ETF with a total of 52 individual holdings. The top holdings are KLA Corporation stock at 2.73%, Best Buy Co. at 2.53%, TD SYNNEX at 2.39%, Hormel Foods at 2.34%, and US Foods Holding at 2.26%.

overview.description: The Invesco Bloomberg Pricing Power ETF (POWA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg Pricing Power index. The fund selects US large- and mid-cap stocks of companies considered well-positioned to maintain stable profit margins in all market conditions. Stocks satisfying a four factor screening process are included in the index, on an equal-weight basis POWA was launched on Dec 15, 2006 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: The ETF That Aims to Build A Wall During Market Weakness
data.text: The ETF industry has something for everyone -- the Invesco Defensive Equity ETF (ticker: DEF) looks to build a wall during periods of stock market weakness, while still offering the potential for gain...

data.title: This defensive, stock-based ETF is beating the market this year
data.text: Invesco's Defensive Equity ETF offers a "modern" approach to seeking safety, says ETF.com's Dave Nadig.
